title: Opportunity
author: Mentalmemento94
selftext: Please message me for a money-making investment opportunity (not a lot, not a little either, so like 💲💲).

replies.author: Think-notlikedasheep
replies.body: Every "money making" opportunity that has ZERO DETAILS posted is 100% a scam.

replies.author: Mentalmemento94
replies.body: Well not mines. I hope you're satisfied, r/raceto10mil banned me and nobody reached out yet. It's just me, of course i'm not going to give away every detail to protect myself.

replies.author: Legouzi6913
replies.body: Protect yourself from what? Don't be surprised if you get banned

replies.author: Mentalmemento94
replies.body: I'm skeptical of everyone else too, but forget it.  You guys can say it's a scam until you're blue in the face, and I can tell you it's not a scam until i'm blue in the face, but I don't see how it's possible to prove it without going through with my offer. You would be a complete fool to trust ANY stranger online 100%. I'm not being charitable, i'm essentially looking for a short-term business partner. Either you believe me and take the inherent risk, or you don't, it's not all that complicated.
